{{ isEditMode ? 'Edit Currency' : 'Add Currency' }}
Auth Active Discard
Currency Name @if (currencyForm.get('CurrencyName')?.invalid && currencyForm.get('CurrencyName')?.touched) { Currency Name is required } Currency Symbol @if (currencyForm.get('CurrencySymbol')?.invalid && currencyForm.get('CurrencySymbol')?.touched) { Currency Symbol is required } Currency Remark @if (currencyForm.get('CurrencyRemark')?.invalid && currencyForm.get('CurrencyRemark')?.touched) { Currency Remark is required }
